concept.description: Labels relay-only role types whose concrete methods all funnel through owner-local helper chains into exactly one foreign production owner without reading or writing owner fields.
concept.cypher: MATCH (owner:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleType) CALL { WITH owner MATCH (owner)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod) CALL { WITH owner, method OPTIONAL MATCH (method)-[:READS|WRITES]->(field:Java:Field)<-[:DECLARES]-(owner) WITH owner, method, count(DISTINCT field) AS ownedFieldAccessCount OPTIONAL MATCH path = (method)-[:INVOKES|VIRTUAL_INVOKES*1..5]->(targetMethod:Java:Method)<-[:DECLARES]-(targetOwner:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE targetOwner <> owner AND all(intermediateMethod IN nodes(path)[0..size(nodes(path)) - 2] WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (owner)-[:DECLARES]->(intermediateMethod) }) WITH method, ownedFieldAccessCount, collect(DISTINCT targetOwner.fqn) AS foreignTargetOwners RETURN method.signature AS signature, ownedFieldAccessCount AS ownedFieldAccessCount, foreignTargetOwners AS foreignTargetOwners } RETURN collect({ signature: signature, ownedFieldAccessCount: ownedFieldAccessCount, foreignTargetOwners: foreignTargetOwners }) AS methodSummaries } WITH owner, methodSummaries WHERE size(methodSummaries) > 0 AND all(summary IN methodSummaries WHERE summary.ownedFieldAccessCount = 0 AND size(summary.foreignTargetOwners) = 1 ) UNWIND methodSummaries AS summary UNWIND summary.foreignTargetOwners AS foreignTargetOwner WITH owner, methodSummaries, collect(DISTINCT foreignTargetOwner) AS distinctForeignTargets WHERE size(distinctForeignTargets) = 1 SET owner:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType, owner.relayTargetFqn = head(distinctForeignTargets), owner.relayMethodCount = size(methodSummaries) RETURN owner AS RelayOnlyRoleType

concept.description: Creates a stable relay edge from a relay-only role to its unique foreign production owner.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType) MATCH (target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE target.fqn = source.relayTargetFqn MERGE (source)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target) RETURN source AS RelayOnlyRoleDependencySource, target AS RelayOnlyRoleDependencyTarget

constraint.description: Domain service roles must not collapse into relay-only wrappers, even when the relay is spread across owner-local helper methods.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_SERVICE' MATCH (source)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS RelayTarget, count(DISTINCT method) AS RelayMethodCount, 'domain service roles must own real domain behavior instead of owner-local helper chains that still collapse into one foreign owner' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' funnels all concrete methods into ' + target.fqn AS ActualOwnership, 'Delete the wrapper, merge the role into the target owner, or add real policy or construction behavior that breaks the single-target relay shape.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, RelayTarget

constraint.description: Domain service roles must not form deeper same-scope relay-only chains, even when each hop stays inside named tactical roles.
constraint.cypher: MATCH path = (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO*2..5]->(terminal:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_SERVICE' AND all(intermediate IN nodes(path)[1..size(nodes(path)) - 2] WHERE intermediate:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType AND coalesce(intermediate.thinRole, false) = false AND coalesce(intermediate.roleScope, '') = coalesce(source.roleScope, '') ) WITH source, terminal, [node IN nodes(path) | coalesce(node.relativePath, node.fqn)] AS chainPath, length(path) AS relayDepth ORDER BY source.relativePath, relayDepth, terminal.fqn WITH source, collect({ relayDepth: relayDepth, terminalTarget: coalesce(terminal.relativePath, terminal.fqn), chainPath: chainPath })[0] AS firstHit RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, firstHit.relayDepth AS RelayDepth, firstHit.terminalTarget AS TerminalTarget, reduce(pathText = '', step IN firstHit.chainPath | CASE WHEN pathText = '' THEN step ELSE pathText + ' -> ' + step END ) AS ChainPath, 'domain service roles must not survive as same-scope relay-only chains across multiple tactical owners' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' starts a relay-only chain with depth ' + toString(firstHit.relayDepth) AS ActualOwnership, 'Collapse the chain, merge intermediate wrappers, or add real owned policy or construction behavior that breaks the relay-only path.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Domain policy roles must not collapse into relay-only wrappers, even when the relay is spread across owner-local helper methods.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_POLICY' MATCH (source)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS RelayTarget, count(DISTINCT method) AS RelayMethodCount, 'domain policy roles must own reusable policy instead of owner-local helper chains that still collapse into one foreign owner' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' funnels all concrete methods into ' + target.fqn AS ActualOwnership, 'Delete the wrapper, merge the role into the target owner, or add real reusable policy that breaks the single-target relay shape.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, RelayTarget

constraint.description: Domain policy roles must not form deeper same-scope relay-only chains, even when each hop stays inside named tactical roles.
constraint.cypher: MATCH path = (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO*2..5]->(terminal:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_POLICY' AND all(intermediate IN nodes(path)[1..size(nodes(path)) - 2] WHERE intermediate:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType AND coalesce(intermediate.thinRole, false) = false AND coalesce(intermediate.roleScope, '') = coalesce(source.roleScope, '') ) WITH source, terminal, [node IN nodes(path) | coalesce(node.relativePath, node.fqn)] AS chainPath, length(path) AS relayDepth ORDER BY source.relativePath, relayDepth, terminal.fqn WITH source, collect({ relayDepth: relayDepth, terminalTarget: coalesce(terminal.relativePath, terminal.fqn), chainPath: chainPath })[0] AS firstHit RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, firstHit.relayDepth AS RelayDepth, firstHit.terminalTarget AS TerminalTarget, reduce(pathText = '', step IN firstHit.chainPath | CASE WHEN pathText = '' THEN step ELSE pathText + ' -> ' + step END ) AS ChainPath, 'domain policy roles must not survive as same-scope relay-only chains across multiple tactical owners' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' starts a relay-only chain with depth ' + toString(firstHit.relayDepth) AS ActualOwnership, 'Collapse the chain, merge intermediate wrappers, or add real reusable policy that breaks the relay-only path.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Domain factory roles must not collapse into relay-only wrappers, even when the relay is spread across owner-local helper methods.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_FACTORY' MATCH (source)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS RelayTarget, count(DISTINCT method) AS RelayMethodCount, 'domain factory roles must own meaningful construction behavior instead of owner-local helper chains that still collapse into one foreign owner' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' funnels all concrete methods into ' + target.fqn AS ActualOwnership, 'Delete the wrapper, merge the role into the target owner, or add real construction behavior that breaks the single-target relay shape.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, RelayTarget

constraint.description: Domain factory roles must not form deeper same-scope relay-only chains, even when each hop stays inside named tactical roles.
constraint.cypher: MATCH path = (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO*2..5]->(terminal:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_FACTORY' AND all(intermediate IN nodes(path)[1..size(nodes(path)) - 2] WHERE intermediate:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType AND coalesce(intermediate.thinRole, false) = false AND coalesce(intermediate.roleScope, '') = coalesce(source.roleScope, '') ) WITH source, terminal, [node IN nodes(path) | coalesce(node.relativePath, node.fqn)] AS chainPath, length(path) AS relayDepth ORDER BY source.relativePath, relayDepth, terminal.fqn WITH source, collect({ relayDepth: relayDepth, terminalTarget: coalesce(terminal.relativePath, terminal.fqn), chainPath: chainPath })[0] AS firstHit RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, firstHit.relayDepth AS RelayDepth, firstHit.terminalTarget AS TerminalTarget, reduce(pathText = '', step IN firstHit.chainPath | CASE WHEN pathText = '' THEN step ELSE pathText + ' -> ' + step END ) AS ChainPath, 'domain factory roles must not survive as same-scope relay-only chains across multiple tactical owners' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' starts a relay-only chain with depth ' + toString(firstHit.relayDepth) AS ActualOwnership, 'Collapse the chain, merge intermediate wrappers, or add real construction behavior that breaks the relay-only path.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Domain port roles must not collapse into relay-only wrappers, even when the relay is spread across owner-local helper methods.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_PORT' MATCH (source)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS RelayTarget, count(DISTINCT method) AS RelayMethodCount, 'domain port roles must own published-state intake or listener coordination instead of owner-local helper chains that still collapse into one foreign owner' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' funnels all concrete methods into ' + target.fqn AS ActualOwnership, 'Delete the wrapper, merge the role into the target owner, or add real listener ownership that breaks the single-target relay shape.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, RelayTarget

constraint.description: Domain port roles must not form deeper same-scope relay-only chains, even when each hop stays inside named tactical roles.
constraint.cypher: MATCH path = (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO*2..5]->(terminal:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_PORT' AND all(intermediate IN nodes(path)[1..size(nodes(path)) - 2] WHERE intermediate:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType AND coalesce(intermediate.thinRole, false) = false AND coalesce(intermediate.roleScope, '') = coalesce(source.roleScope, '') ) WITH source, terminal, [node IN nodes(path) | coalesce(node.relativePath, node.fqn)] AS chainPath, length(path) AS relayDepth ORDER BY source.relativePath, relayDepth, terminal.fqn WITH source, collect({ relayDepth: relayDepth, terminalTarget: coalesce(terminal.relativePath, terminal.fqn), chainPath: chainPath })[0] AS firstHit RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, firstHit.relayDepth AS RelayDepth, firstHit.terminalTarget AS TerminalTarget, reduce(pathText = '', step IN firstHit.chainPath | CASE WHEN pathText = '' THEN step ELSE pathText + ' -> ' + step END ) AS ChainPath, 'domain port roles must not survive as same-scope relay-only chains across multiple tactical owners' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' starts a relay-only chain with depth ' + toString(firstHit.relayDepth) AS ActualOwnership, 'Collapse the chain, merge intermediate wrappers, or add real listener ownership that breaks the relay-only path.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Domain repository roles must not collapse into relay-only wrappers, even when the relay is spread across owner-local helper methods.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_REPOSITORY' MATCH (source)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS RelayTarget, count(DISTINCT method) AS RelayMethodCount, 'domain repository roles must own foreign mutation or data-access collaboration instead of owner-local helper chains that still collapse into one foreign owner' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' funnels all concrete methods into ' + target.fqn AS ActualOwnership, 'Delete the wrapper, merge the role into the target owner, or add real repository ownership that breaks the single-target relay shape.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, RelayTarget

constraint.description: Domain repository roles must not form deeper same-scope relay-only chains, even when each hop stays inside named tactical roles.
constraint.cypher: MATCH path = (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO*2..5]->(terminal:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_REPOSITORY' AND all(intermediate IN nodes(path)[1..size(nodes(path)) - 2] WHERE intermediate:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType AND coalesce(intermediate.thinRole, false) = false AND coalesce(intermediate.roleScope, '') = coalesce(source.roleScope, '') ) WITH source, terminal, [node IN nodes(path) | coalesce(node.relativePath, node.fqn)] AS chainPath, length(path) AS relayDepth ORDER BY source.relativePath, relayDepth, terminal.fqn WITH source, collect({ relayDepth: relayDepth, terminalTarget: coalesce(terminal.relativePath, terminal.fqn), chainPath: chainPath })[0] AS firstHit RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, firstHit.relayDepth AS RelayDepth, firstHit.terminalTarget AS TerminalTarget, reduce(pathText = '', step IN firstHit.chainPath | CASE WHEN pathText = '' THEN step ELSE pathText + ' -> ' + step END ) AS ChainPath, 'domain repository roles must not survive as same-scope relay-only chains across multiple tactical owners' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' starts a relay-only chain with depth ' + toString(firstHit.relayDepth) AS ActualOwnership, 'Collapse the chain, merge intermediate wrappers, or add real repository ownership that breaks the relay-only path.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Thin roles that relay into a deeper relay chain are reported for review without becoming a blocker.
constraint.cypher: MATCH path = (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO*2..5]->(terminal:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE coalesce(source.thinRole, false) = true WITH source, terminal, length(path) AS relayDepth ORDER BY source.relativePath, relayDepth, terminal.fqn WITH source, collect({ relayDepth: relayDepth, terminalTarget: coalesce(terminal.relativePath, terminal.fqn) })[0] AS firstHit RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, firstHit.relayDepth AS RelayDepth, firstHit.terminalTarget AS TerminalTarget, 'thin roles may stay narrow, but review whether the relay stack still buys a real boundary once it extends beyond one hop' AS ExpectedReview, source.fqn + ' starts a relay stack with depth ' + toString(firstHit.relayDepth) AS ActualReview, 'Review whether the chain should collapse, move ownership downward, or stay documented as an intentional thin seam.' AS Details ORDER BY Source
